whatsapp.audience: Community intermediaries, chiefs, NGO field officers, literate pastoralists
whatsapp.guidance: Forward to community WhatsApp groups. Pin high-priority messages. Use local language where possible.

Normal.body:
🟢 *SAMBURU EWS — NORMAL*

Drought Status: NORMAL
Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
Date: [DATE]

Conditions are within seasonal norms. Livestock and pasture outlook is positive.

✅ Continue normal grazing rotation
✅ Monitor water sources weekly

Check latest alert: samburuews.example
Dial *384# for updates on any phone.

Watch.body:
🔵 *SAMBURU EWS — WATCH*

Drought Status: WATCH
Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
Date: [DATE]

Early signs of stress detected. Monitor closely.

⚠️ Begin monitoring pasture condition daily
⚠️ Note nearest dry-season water points
⚠️ Consider early destocking of weak animals

Dial *384# for daily updates on any phone.

Alert.body:
🟠 *SAMBURU EWS — ALERT ⚠️*

Drought Status: ALERT
Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
Date: [DATE]

Conditions are deteriorating. Early action required.

⚠️ Begin early destocking — sell weak livestock NOW
⚠️ Move herds toward known dry-season pastures
⚠️ Register with your ward office for support
⚠️ Contact NDMA: 0800-723-253 (FREE)

Dial *384# for daily updates on any phone.
Share this message with others.

Alarm.body:
🔴 *SAMBURU EWS — ALARM 🚨*

Drought Status: ALARM
Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
Date: [DATE]

Severe conditions. Emergency response activated.

🆘 Destock immediately — sell all weak animals
🆘 Move to emergency grazing reserves
🆘 Collect water relief at [nearest relief point]
🆘 Kenya Red Cross: 0800-723-253 (FREE)
🆘 County Government Emergency: 0703-044-000

Dial *384# for updates. SHARE URGENTLY.

Emergency.body:
⛔ *SAMBURU EWS — EMERGENCY 🆘*

Drought Status: EMERGENCY
Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
Date: [DATE]

‼️ DROUGHT EMERGENCY DECLARED ‼️

🆘 Evacuation to emergency pastures REQUIRED
🆘 Report to nearest NDMA/County relief centre
🆘 Emergency livestock off-take in progress
🆘 NDMA Hotline: 0800-723-253 (FREE 24hrs)
🆘 Red Cross Emergency: 0800-723-253
🆘 Samburu County: 0703-044-000

Dial *384# now. Share with ALL community members.

facebook.audience: Wider public, NGOs, government agencies, media, diaspora
facebook.guidance: Post in county Facebook groups and pages. Tag NDMA, county government, and partner NGOs. Use the hashtags provided.

Normal.post:
🟢 Samburu EWS Update — NORMAL CONDITIONS

Our latest drought risk assessment for Samburu County shows conditions within seasonal norms. Pastoralist communities can continue normal activities while maintaining routine monitoring.

📊 Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
📅 Assessment Date: [DATE]
🌿 Indigenous indicators: Favourable
🌦️ KMD outlook: Within normal range

Stay informed: dial *384# | Visit samburuews.example

#SamburuEWS #DroughtEarlyWarning #Samburu #Kenya #NDMA

Alert.post:
🟠 Samburu EWS Update — ALERT LEVEL ⚠️

Drought risk in Samburu County has reached ALERT level. Community members and stakeholders should begin early preparedness actions.

📊 Risk Score: [SCORE]/100
📅 Assessment Date: [DATE]
⚠️ Recommended: Early destocking, livestock movement planning

For pastoralists: dial *384# on any phone for daily updates.
For NGOs/Government: see stakeholder actions at samburuews.example

#SamburuEWS #DroughtAlert #EarlyWarning #Samburu #ASAL #Kenya

Emergency.post:
🆘 DROUGHT EMERGENCY — SAMBURU COUNTY

Samburu EWS has recorded an EMERGENCY level drought risk. A humanitarian response is required immediately.

📊 Risk Score: [SCORE]/100 | Status: EMERGENCY
📅 Date: [DATE]

🆘 NDMA Hotline: 0800-723-253 (Free, 24hrs)
🆘 Red Cross Kenya: 0800-723-253
🆘 Samburu County Gov: 0703-044-000

All stakeholders please refer to your emergency response protocols.

#SamburuEWSEmergency #DroughtEmergency #HumanitarianAid #Kenya

radio.language_note: Scripts available in English. Translate to Samburu and Swahili before broadcasting. Read slowly and clearly. Station: [STATION NAME]. DJ/Presenter: [NAME].

Normal.script:
[SFX: soft traditional music fade in]
ATTENTION Samburu County — This is a Drought Early Warning update.
The current drought risk level is NORMAL. Conditions are within seasonal norms.
Continue normal grazing rotation and monitor water sources.
For daily updates, dial star three eight four hash on any phone — that is *384#.
This message is brought to you by the Samburu Early Warning System.
[SFX: music fade out]

Alert.script:
[SFX: alert tone — three short beeps]
ATTENTION — DROUGHT ALERT for Samburu County.
The drought risk level is now ALERT. Pasture and water conditions are deteriorating.
Pastoralists: begin early destocking and move livestock to dry-season areas.
For help, call NDMA free on zero-eight-hundred — seven-two-three — two-five-three.
Dial *384# for daily alerts on any phone.
[SFX: alert tone]

Alarm.script:
[SFX: urgent alarm tone]
URGENT — DROUGHT ALARM for Samburu County.
Conditions are SEVERE. Emergency response has been activated.
Destock now. Move to emergency grazing reserves.
Report to your nearest ward office to register for relief support.
NDMA Emergency Line: zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three — FREE.
Dial *384# on any phone for live updates.
[SFX: alarm tone]

Emergency.script:
[SFX: emergency siren]
EMERGENCY BROADCAST — Samburu County Drought Emergency.
A DROUGHT EMERGENCY has been declared. All pastoralists must take immediate action.
Evacuate to emergency grazing areas. Report to relief centres for food and water.
NDMA Hotline: zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three — AVAILABLE 24 HOURS FREE.
Repeat: NDMA zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three.
[SFX: siren]

Normal.script:
[SFX: soft traditional Samburu music, fade in slowly]
Good [morning/afternoon/evening], Samburu County. This is your Drought Early Warning update from the Samburu EWS platform.

The current drought risk level is NORMAL — that means conditions are within seasonal norms. Pasture and water availability are adequate for this time of year.

For pastoralists: continue your normal grazing rotation. Monitor your water sources weekly. If you notice any changes — unusual livestock behaviour, plants dying early, or birds migrating early — please report to your community scout or dial *384# on any phone.

The Samburu EWS combines scientific data from the Kenya Meteorological Department and NDMA with traditional knowledge from Samburu elders. For the latest update, dial star-three-eight-four-hash — that is *384# — free on any Safaricom or Airtel phone.

Stay safe. Stay informed. Samburu EWS.
[SFX: music fade out]

Alert.script:
[SFX: alert chime — three clear tones]
This is an important Drought Alert message for Samburu County from the Samburu EWS platform.

The current drought risk level is ALERT. Vegetation and water conditions are deteriorating faster than normal for this season. Indigenous indicators from community elders also signal concern.

For PASTORALISTS: Begin early destocking now — sell or move weak and unproductive animals before conditions worsen. Identify and move toward known dry-season grazing areas. Contact your chief or ward office to register your location.

For COMMUNITY LEADERS and CHIEFS: Alert your communities and report to the NDMA sub-county office. Coordinate with NGO partners for contingency planning.

For help: call NDMA free on zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three. Or dial *384# on any phone for live daily updates.

This has been a Drought Alert from Samburu EWS. Stay prepared.
[SFX: alert chime]

Alarm.script:
[SFX: urgent alarm — repeated beeping]
URGENT DROUGHT ALARM — This is an emergency broadcast for Samburu County.

The Samburu EWS has declared ALARM level conditions. Pasture is severely depleted. Water sources are far beyond normal distances. Livestock body condition is poor and deteriorating.

For PASTORALISTS: Implement emergency destocking NOW. Do not wait — weak animals lose value rapidly. Move to emergency grazing reserves with prior clearance. Ensure children, elders, and the sick are near water relief points.

For NGOs and GOVERNMENT: Pre-position relief supplies at designated distribution points. Coordinate emergency livestock off-take programs. Activate your contingency plans.

Emergency contacts: NDMA Hotline — zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three, available FREE, 24 hours. Kenya Red Cross — zero-seven-one-nine-seven-two-seven-zero-zero.

For live updates, dial *384# on any phone.

This is an ALARM. Take action now.
[SFX: alarm tone]

Emergency.script:
[SFX: emergency siren — sustained]
EMERGENCY BROADCAST. DROUGHT EMERGENCY DECLARED IN SAMBURU COUNTY.

The Samburu County Government and NDMA have declared a DROUGHT EMERGENCY. This is the most severe level of drought risk. Immediate humanitarian action is required.

For ALL PASTORALISTS: Evacuate livestock to designated emergency grazing areas as directed by county officials. Report immediately to your nearest NDMA or county relief centre to register for food, water, and livestock support.

For SCHOOLS and HEALTH FACILITIES: Emergency water and food supplies are being coordinated. Contact the county emergency operations centre.

For ALL STAKEHOLDERS: Activate your emergency response protocols immediately.

Emergency Contacts:
- NDMA Hotline: zero-eight-hundred-seven-two-three-two-five-three — FREE, 24 hours
- Kenya Red Cross: zero-seven-one-nine-seven-two-seven-zero-zero
- Samburu County Emergency: zero-seven-zero-three-zero-four-four-zero-zero-zero

Dial *384# on any phone for live emergency information.

This is a DROUGHT EMERGENCY. Repeat: DROUGHT EMERGENCY in Samburu County.
[SFX: siren]

ussd.description: Pull-based USSD early warning service accessible on any mobile phone without internet or data. Charged at standard USSD rates (fractions of a cent per session).

1.label: Current Alert Level
1.response: Displays the current risk level (Normal/Watch/Alert/Alarm/Emergency), composite score, and top 3 reasons.

2.label: Advice for Pastoralists
2.response: Plain-language action guidance tailored to the current alert level, in English and Samburu.

3.label: Where to Get Help
3.response: Lists NDMA, Kenya Red Cross, and Samburu County emergency contact numbers with a call-back option.

4.label: Change Language
4.response: Switch menu language between English and Samburu (demo: two options).
